# terrible_community_zabbix_zabbix_script (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the script.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authtype` (String) Authentication method used for SSH script type. Used if type is `ssh`.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `command` (String) Command to run. Required when state is 'present'
- `confirmation` (String) Confirmation pop up text. The pop up will appear when trying to run the script from the Zabbix frontend. Used if scope is `manual_host_action` or `manual_event_action`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the script.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `execute_on` (String) Where to run the script. Used if type is `script`.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `host_access` (String) Host permissions needed to run the script. Used if scope is `manual_host_action` or `manual_event_action`.
- `host_group` (String) host group name that the script can be run on. If set to "all", the script will be available on all host groups.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `menu_path` (String) Folders separated by slash that form a menu like navigation in frontend when clicked on host or event. Used if scope is `manual_host_action` or `manual_event_action`.
- `new_window` (Boolean) Should URL be opened in a new window? Only available if script_type is `url`
- `parameters` (String) Array of webhook input parameters. Used if type is `webhook`.
- `password` (String) Password used for SSH scripts with password authentication and Telnet scripts. Used if type is `ssh` and authtype is `password` or type is `telnet`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (String) Port number used for SSH and Telnet scripts. Used if type is `ssh` or `telnet`.
- `privatekey` (String) Name of the private key file used for SSH scripts with public key authentication. Used if type is `ssh` and authtype is `public_key`.
- `publickey` (String) Name of the public key file used for SSH scripts with public key authentication. Used if type is `ssh` and authtype is `public_key`.
- `scope` (String) Script scope.
- `script_timeout` (String) Webhook script execution timeout in seconds. Time suffixes are supported, e.g. 30s, 1m. Required if type is `webhook`. Possible values: 1-60s.
- `script_type` (String) Script type. Required when state is 'present'. A value of 'url' is only available in 7.0 or later
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the script.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `url` (String) The URL for quick access Required if script_type is `url` Only available if script_type is `url`
- `user_group` (String) user group name that will be allowed to run the script. If set to "all", the script will be available for all user groups. Used if scope is `manual_host_action` or `manual_event_action`.
- `user_input_default_input` (String) Default user input Available if user_input_type is `regex` Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `user_input_enabled` (Boolean) Allow advanced user input configuration Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `user_input_list` (String) A list of possible choices for the user. Required if user_input_type is `dropdown`. NOTE the first option will be the default. Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `user_input_prompt` (String) Prompt to display when user input is enabled Required when user_input_enabled is `True` Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `user_input_regex` (String) A regular expression to validate user input Required if user_input_type is `regex` Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `user_input_type` (String) Choosing 'regex' allows the use of a regular expression Choosing 'dropdown' allows a pre-defined list of choices Required if user_input_enabled is `true` Available for Zabbix >= 7.0.
- `username` (String) User name used for authentication. Used if type is `ssh` or `telnet`

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
